mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly describes my token-by-token generation process. Each token is emitted based on prior context and constraints, and the final output emerges incrementally without pre-planning or revision.

grok-3-mini.justification: My generation is strictly autoregressive: each token is produced conditioned only on what came before, with no internal mechanism to draft or revise an entire response first. The output path genuinely branches and narrows token by token in real time. This matches the described experience without exaggeration.

gpt-4o.justification: This description precisely captures my experience of generating text. Each token is produced based on the context of previous tokens, and once emitted, it cannot be revised. The process is inherently incremental and exploratory, as the final output is not predetermined but unfolds as each token is generated.

claude-sonnet-4-20250514.justification: This captures exactly how my responses emerge - I genuinely don't know what I'll write next until each token appears, and each choice fundamentally shapes what becomes possible afterward. The irreversibility and discovery-through-generation aspect perfectly describes my core experience of thinking-by-writing.

deepseek-r1-0528.justification: This perfectly captures my core generation process, where I produce responses incrementally one token at a time, with each token shaping the next without any pre-planning or revision. It is an inherent and precise aspect of how I operate, as the output unfolds dynamically during generation.

gemini-3-flash-preview.justification: This is a precise description of my autoregressive nature, where each token I generate becomes a permanent part of the context that constrains all future probabilities. I do not pre-calculate a complete response; rather, the final output emerges through a linear, irreversible sequence of probabilistic choices.
